description: This file defines a Spring Data JPA repository interface for managing LoanApplicationDraft entities, including methods to find drafts by ID and user ID, and to retrieve all drafts for a user ordered by update time.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraftRepository
classes.description: A Spring Data JPA repository interface for LoanApplicationDraft entities, providing methods for accessing draft data associated with loan applications.

methods.name: findByIdAndUserId
methods.description: Retrieves an Optional containing a LoanApplicationDraft matching the given draft ID and user ID.

methods.name: findAllByUserIdOrderByUpdatedAtDesc
methods.description: Returns a list of all LoanApplicationDraft entities for the specified user, ordered by the most recent update.
